metadata.content:
Assignment 5
SPSS
Objective: Using SPSS, analyze a dataset to examine whether study hours influence academic 
performance. Perform statistical analysis and interpret the findings to support conclusions. Use 
the data given below.
Tasks:
1.Data Preparation 
o
Create variables and input the dataset in SPSS 
2.Descriptive Analysis 
o
Compute mean and standard deviation 
3.Correlation Analysis 
o
Determine the strength and direction of relationship 
4.Hypothesis Testing 
o
Perform Independent Sample t-test 
o
State null and alternative hypotheses 
5.Interpretation 
o
Interpret results and provide conclusion
Outputs
 Print-out of SPSS output file (.spv or screenshots) 
 Brief report (1–2 pages) including: 

Objective 

Method use

Results & conclusion
Dataset (Students Data)
Student IndexStudy Hours Marks
